expectations.evidence: with_skill: DashboardLayout.tsx follows tcp CLI conventions — proper interface export, lucide-react icons, structured layout with data-testid attributes
Line 55-121: Desktop sidebar with aside element, data-testid='dashboard-sidebar', nav links, collapsible state
Lines 200-258: header element with data-testid='dashboard-header', page title, notification bell, user avatar
Lines 261-266: main element with data-testid='dashboard-main', renders {children}
Extensive use of md: and lg: breakpoints throughout — md:flex, md:w-60, lg:w-64, md:hidden, md:px-6, lg:px-8
Line 6: children: ReactNode in DashboardLayoutProps; line 265: {children} rendered in main area
Extensive Tailwind: flex, min-h-screen, bg-zinc-50, border-r, rounded-lg, transition-colors, etc.
Only UI state: useState for mobileMenuOpen and sidebarCollapsed (sidebar toggle) — no business logic, no data fetching
No fetch or axios calls in DashboardLayout.tsx
